seo.title: Bike service — Vukan's Bike
seo.description: Service and repairs for all kinds of bikes. One expert, personal approach. Contact: 070 815 379 or email.

props.headline: Bike service
props.subheadline: Repairs, maintenance, and inspection for urban, road, gravel, mountain, and e-bikes. Personal service — one mechanic who knows your bike; we have particular experience with MTB and trail riding.

props.heading: Service prices
props.subheading: Prices by agreement; for a firm slot, contact us by email or on 070 815 379.

packages.name: Basic service
packages.description: Inspection and basic maintenance of mechanical systems.
features: Function check and fine-tuning of gears and brakes
Tyre pressure checked and adjusted if needed
Chain wear measured
Basic wheel truing
Chain lubricated (oil or liquid wax)
Key moving points greased
Headset play adjusted
Consumables (cleaners and lubes) included

packages.name: Basic e-bike service
packages.label: E-bike
packages.description: Same as basic service, plus diagnostics and software updates for Bosch, Shimano, and Giant drives.
features: Function check and fine-tuning of gears and brakes
Tyre pressure checked and adjusted if needed
Chain wear measured
Basic wheel truing
Chain lubricated (oil or liquid wax)
Key moving points greased
Headset play adjusted
Consumables (cleaners and lubes) included
Diagnostics, software update, and printed report (Bosch, Shimano, Giant)

packages.name: Standard service
packages.description: More thorough mechanical inspection of drivetrain, brakes, and bearings.
features: Drivetrain checked and gears precisely adjusted
Brake system and pads/rims checked; pads replaced if worn
Tyre pressure checked and adjusted if needed
Chain wear measured
Basic wheel truing
Chain lubricated (oil or liquid wax)
Key moving points greased
Headset and bottom bracket checked, greased, or replaced if needed
Cables and housings checked and replaced if needed
Hubs checked and regreased if needed
Consumables (cleaners and lubes) included

packages.name: Standard e-bike service
packages.label: E-bike
packages.description: Same as standard service, plus diagnostics and software updates for Bosch, Shimano, and Giant drives.
features: Drivetrain checked and gears precisely adjusted
Brake system and pads/rims checked; pads replaced if worn
Tyre pressure checked and adjusted if needed
Chain wear measured; chain replaced if needed
Basic wheel truing
Chain lubricated (oil or liquid wax)
Key moving points greased
Headset checked, greased, or replaced if needed
Cables and housings checked and replaced if needed
Hubs checked and regreased if needed
Consumables (cleaners and lubes) included
Diagnostics, software update, and printed report (Bosch, Shimano, Giant)

packages.name: Full MTB service (hardtail / front suspension)
packages.label: MTB
packages.description: Standard service plus bleeding hydraulic disc brakes and a quick clean.
features: Everything included in standard service
Bleeding front and rear hydraulic disc brakes
Basic quick clean of the bike

packages.name: Full e-MTB service (front suspension)
packages.label: E-MTB
packages.description: Standard e-bike service plus bleeding hydraulic brakes and a quick clean.
features: Everything included in standard e-bike service
Bleeding front and rear hydraulic disc brakes
Basic quick clean of the bike

packages.name: Full suspension MTB overhaul
packages.label: MTB full sus
packages.description: Standard service plus brakes, cleaning, and pivot bearing service (bearings billed separately).
features: Everything included in standard service
Bleeding front and rear hydraulic disc brakes
Basic quick clean of the bike
Pivot bearings cleaned, inspected, and replaced if needed (bearings charged separately)

packages.name: Full suspension e-MTB overhaul
packages.label: E-MTB full sus
packages.description: Standard e-bike service plus brakes, cleaning, and pivot bearing service (bearings billed separately).
features: Everything included in standard e-bike service
Bleeding front and rear hydraulic disc brakes
Basic quick clean of the bike
Pivot bearings cleaned, inspected, and replaced if needed (bearings charged separately)

packages.name: Assembly and setup (online purchase)
packages.description: Outside core hours: build, adjustments, and packaging disposal.
features: Bike assembly
Adjustment of key components (stem, tyres, cables, etc.)
Full baseline setup package
Accessory fitting
Proper disposal of packaging (cardboard, plastic, etc.)
Basic suspension setup (sag and rebound)

props.note: Parts (e.g. pivot bearings, brake pads) and extra repairs are quoted separately. We always agree before starting work.
props.contactCta: Book a service slot by email or phone

props.heading: How service works
props.subheading: Simple: message or call, and we arrange everything.

steps.title: Contact
steps.description: Email or call 070 815 379. Describe what is wrong with the bike and we arrange drop-off.

steps.title: Drop off
steps.description: Bring the bike to the workshop. We give it a quick look and tell you what is needed and at what cost.

steps.title: Service
steps.description: A mechanic does the work. When the bike is ready, we let you know.

steps.title: Pickup
steps.description: Collect the bike and check that everything feels right. Payment on pickup.
details: Short test ride if you like

items.question: How do I book a service?
items.answer: Call 070 815 379 or send an email. Describe the issue or the service you want, and we arrange bike drop-off. There are no fixed opening hours — appointments are always by agreement.

items.question: Which bikes do you service?
items.answer: All of them: urban, road, gravel, mountain, and e-bikes (mechanical side). We have the most experience with MTB and trail, but we treat every type with the same care.

items.question: How soon will the bike be ready?
items.answer: It depends on the scope and how busy we are. At drop-off we give an approximate date. Small urgent repairs are often quicker.

items.question: Do I need a deposit?
items.answer: No. Payment on pickup. For more expensive parts we confirm with you first.

items.question: Do you service e-bikes?
items.answer: Yes for the mechanical side. For batteries and motors we usually recommend the manufacturer service, except for straightforward jobs.

props.heading: Service contact
props.text: For a service booking or questions, reach us by email or phone. We work by appointment, without fixed opening hours.
